title: Human Rights Statement
gist: A corporate human-rights policy statement from the World Gold Council covering its employees, activities, suppliers and members; it references the UN Guiding Principles, OECD Guidelines, and the WGC's Responsible Gold Mining Principles. It carries no market data, prices, or investable signal.

insights.claim: Conformance with the Responsible Gold Mining Principles, released September 2019, is a mandatory requirement for World Gold Council membership.
insights.speaker: World Gold Council
insights.so_what: Establishes an ESG governance bar for WGC member gold miners, relevant only as compliance context, not a market signal.
insights.quote: Conformance with the Responsible Gold Mining Principles is a requirement for membership of the WGC.
insights.locator: Our Members — 'Whilst our members operate independently'

insights.claim: This document is a boilerplate corporate human-rights policy and contains no gold prices, demand data, or other investable market signal.
insights.speaker: World Gold Council
insights.so_what: Flagged honestly: nothing actionable here for an investor; included only for completeness.
